message:
fix(patrol): burn previous root wisps before creating new ones (gt-92jh)

autoSpawnPatrol() now calls burnPreviousPatrolWisps() before creating a new
patrol wisp. This finds all hooked patrol wisps for the same role/assignee
and force-closes them with their descendants, preventing the accumulation
of ~500-700 orphaned root wisps/day across patrol formulas.

Previously, cleanup was only handled by callers (patrol_report.go,
outputPatrolContext), but patrol_new.go called autoSpawnPatrol() directly
without cleanup, and the caller-based cleanup only handled stale patrols
(all children closed), not active ones being replaced.
